mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vital_signs (patient_id, record_date, record_time, systolic_bp, diastolic_bp, heart_rate, blood_sugar, temperature, blood_oxygen, recorded_by, notes) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{recordDate}, #{recordTime}, #{systolicBp}, #{diastolicBp}, #{heartRate}, #{bloodSugar}, #{temperature}, #{bloodOxygen}, #{recordedBy}, #{notes})
mapper.update: UPDATE vital_signs SET patient_id = #{patientId}, record_date = #{recordDate}, record_time = #{recordTime}, systolic_bp = #{systolicBp}, diastolic_bp = #{diastolicBp}, heart_rate = #{heartRate}, blood_sugar = #{bloodSugar}, temperature = #{temperature}, blood_oxygen = #{bloodOxygen}, recorded_by = #{recordedBy}, notes = #{notes} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_id, record_date, record_time, systolic_bp, diastolic_bp, heart_rate, blood_sugar, temperature, blood_oxygen, recorded_by, notes, created_at FROM vital_signs WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, patient_id, record_date, record_time, systolic_bp, diastolic_bp, heart_rate, blood_sugar, temperature, blood_oxygen, recorded_by, notes, created_at FROM vital_signs ORDER BY record_date DESC, record_time DESC

SELECT id, patient_id, record_date, record_time, systolic_bp, diastolic_bp, heart_rate, blood_sugar, temperature, blood_oxygen, recorded_by, notes, created_at FROM vital_signs WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND record_date = #{recordDate} ORDER BY record_time
